title: Beton's Rations and food
description: Just a little more food and some food boxes
body:
So, about mod. 
There is, like, aprox.30 new food items and (i think) ~10 not food items. 
Maybe there will be updates, maybe not.

Features: 
- Cartboard reusable boxes, where you can store canned food
- Field rations
- Easy, simple and balanced crafts
- Nice, not-too-out-of-style and balanced food
- New villager trade

Some food information: 
- Canned food can be crafted from a variety of ingridients; and it's slightly worse than "top" ingridient. For example, you can make "Canned Meat" out of beef or rabbit, but beef will do more, when cooked by itself
- Chocolate bars can be eaten realy fast
- You can burn shashlik. You should burn shashlik
- When holding Ration or Box with something in main hand, right click to open. You will recieve contents + empty box
- Steel cans are reusable, and you even can smelt them 
- Cardboard box are also reusable, and can be used as fuel
- Cups are reusable... and now can be smelt too!
- There may be some funny trolling with overboilng condensed milk
